title: Yellow
why_this_song: Short, repetitive lines with basic color + nature vocabulary. A gentle introduction to past simple ('came') and present simple narration.

vocab_hooks.note: color; used as a mood word in the song

grammar_callouts: look at the stars / look how they shine — imperative + how-clause

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.excerpt: Look how they shine for you
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Yellow" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Yellow" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yellow" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yellow" na música inteira?

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Exceptionally simple vocabulary makes this a low-risk first song. Focus on pronunciation of 'yellow' (/ˈjɛləʊ/) — the 'y' consonant + 'ow' diphthong is tricky for PT speakers.

lines: Look how they shine for you
(Ah) Your skin, oh, yeah, your skin and bones
(Ah) And you know, you know I love you so
